ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(StageName),NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type,"Feature Update")) , Probability >= 0.25, RecordTypeId <> '012b0000000cfCa', /*Panel Acquisition*/ $Profile.Id <> '00eb0000000oBvcAAE', RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Rank_Ranger", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps", NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name, 'Integration')), $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Partnership", (ISPICKVAL(Type,"Renewal")), Count_Tracking_Products__c = 0, IsClosed = false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please make sure to select all products via the Product Tracking button to proceed
